CREATE TABLE s3_data (id UInt32, name String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO s3_data SELECT id, name, value FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE id % 2 = 0;

SELECT id, name, value FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', 'CSVWithNames', extra_credentials(role_arn = 'arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/ClickHouseAccessRole-001')) WHERE value > 100;

SELECT id, sum(value) AS total_value FROM (SELECT * FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE name LIKE 'A%') GROUP BY id ORDER BY total_value DESC;

SELECT a.id, b.name FROM (SELECT id FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames')) AS a JOIN (SELECT name FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames')) AS b ON a.id = b.name;

WITH (SELECT max(value) FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames')) AS max_value SELECT COUNT(*) FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE value > max_value;
CREATE TABLE temp_s3_data AS SELECT * FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT DISTINCT name FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/mta/*.tsv', '<KEY>', '<SECRET>', 'TSVWithNames') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_s3_data WHERE id IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY name;
